name: Spago Nanomedical AB (publ)
summary: Spago Nanomedical AB (publ) develops nanomaterials for cancer diagnostics and treatment. It offers SpagoPix, a cancer selective MRI contrast agent; and Tumorad, a tumor selective radiation treatment. The company was formerly known as Spago Imaging AB (publ) and changed its name to Spago Nanomedical AB (publ) in May 2014. Spago Nanomedical AB (publ) was founded in 2007 and is based in Lund, Sweden.
